state.next-action: `14-01` is complete: the homepage quote-estimator upgrade is now captured as phase 14. Next execute `14-02` to audit the current square-footage-first pricing model, define the calibration variables and operator override rules, and settle the optional image-intake contract before implementation starts on homepage uploads. The visual-composer stream is now planned as phases `15` through `17`: start with `15-01` to audit existing blocks from the current Payload/template implementation, then complete phase `15` before moving to phase `16` inline editing and phase `17` reusable/dynamic/container depth.
